author: bobylito
body:
* chore: fix types in doc for getNumericRefinement (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#564) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/86ef8aad2839b4ab494207d87b7617ac10b277d9, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/564 https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/556
 * chore(test): delete indices at the end of the tests (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#570) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/eaaebcb5b1c33386587da9287bd826246c2ac939, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/560
 * chore: update yarn.lock https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/b83dd831c4b344d1903cdfb64c4534835056596e
 * docs(readme): fix typo (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#565) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/bde40ef1ec99c718c18ee7fa2354f7d5ac6b10e9, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/565
 * feat(search): Promisify  (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#571) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/7b2c7a543a61b9901dd1b57ebf4d8015b18dc06d
 * feat(sffv): Use client SFFV over index SFFV (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#572) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/0367d8ab9e3d043564ee8a976880c1e032736a68
